ddls:
CREATE TABLE "highways" (
  "highway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each highway segment */,
  "highway_name" TEXT /* Name of the highway */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the highway segment */,
  "distance_mi" REAL /* Distance of the segment in miles */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Distance of the segment in kilometers */,
  "highway_status" TEXT /* Current status of the highway (e.g., open, closed, under construction) */,
  "construction_start_date" TEXT /* Date when construction started */,
  "construction_end_date" TEXT /* Estimated date when construction will end */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the highway information was last updated */,
  "maintenance_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team responsible for maintenance */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit for the highway segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("highway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exits" (
  "exit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exit */,
  "highway_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the highway segment where the exit is located */,
  "exit_number" TEXT /* Exit number */,
  "exit_name" TEXT /* Name of the exit */,
  "destinations" TEXT /* Destinations accessible from the exit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the exit */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the exit */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the exit */,
  "exit_status" TEXT /* Current status of the exit (e.g., open, closed, under construction) */,
  "construction_start_date" TEXT /* Date when construction started */,
  "construction_end_date" TEXT /* Estimated date when construction will end */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the exit information was last updated */,
  "maintenance_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team responsible for maintenance */,
  "traffic_light_status" TEXT /* Status of traffic lights at the exit (e.g., operational, malfunctioning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exits_highway_id FOREIGN KEY ("highway_id") REFERENCES highways ("highway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exits_destinations FOREIGN KEY ("destinations") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "destination_name" TEXT /* Name of the destination */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the destination */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the destination */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the destination */,
  "distance_from_exit" REAL /* Distance from the exit to the destination */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the destination information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "exit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exit the note belongs to */,
  "note_description" TEXT /* Description of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., construction, closure, event) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the note is applicable from */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the note is applicable until */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_exit_id FOREIGN KEY ("exit_id") REFERENCES exits ("exit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distance_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the distance unit (e.g., miles, kilometers) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to convert between units */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., traffic manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "highway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the highway segment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_highway_id FOREIGN KEY ("highway_id") REFERENCES highways ("highway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
